settings.heading:
Luxury you
can live in
settings.body:
We started Shades of You from a simple belief — that everyday ethnic wear shouldn't ask you to choose between beauty and comfort. That the clothes you reach for every morning can be handcrafted, thoughtful, and genuinely good to wear.

Every piece is printed on natural fabric using traditional batik — a slow, wax-resist technique where no two prints come out the same. That slight variation isn't imperfection. It's the mark of something made by hand.
settings.quote: "Slow luxury, built with intention — where the art comes first, and the woman always comes first."

settings.text: Batik is a slow printing technique where wax and dye interact organically on natural fabrics. Patterns are created by hand, guided by skill rather than machines.
Each piece carries subtle variations — a slightly deeper edge, a softer centre, a bleed of colour where the wax cracked just so. That is not error. That is the art.

settings.quote: Wore it all day at work and was still comfortable by evening
